criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The range and effectiveness of features offered by the app to enhance productivity.
criteria.sources: Product descriptions, user reviews, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The ease of use, interface design, and overall user satisfaction.
criteria.sources: User reviews, usability studies, and expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: The app's ability to integrate with other tools and platforms.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, user reviews, and integration listings.

criteria.name: AI Implementation
criteria.description: The extent and sophistication of AI features within the app.
criteria.sources: Product descriptions, technical documentation, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: Cost-effectiveness
criteria.description: The value provided by the app relative to its price.
criteria.sources: Pricing information, user reviews, and cost-benefit analyses.
